**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Extremum and spatial semantic dual circuit breaker triggered. The rampant Apple Inc. consumer electronics empire OEM hallucination in the original data has been completely cleared. This enterprise was slapped with the highly heavy-industry-flavored tag of 'Electronic Device Manufacturing' in the commercial system. But the forensic probe revealed two extremely anti-common-sense physical underlying parameters: the insured headcount is only 1 person, and the registered address is located at Room 110, Tianzhu Block, 'Tiandi Xincheng' (an extremely famous, super-large residential community in Nanjing). It is absolutely impossible for 1 person to open a high-tech electronic manufacturing factory in Room 110 of a massive residential community (usually a ground-floor shop or a residence). The probe peeled open its complex business license scope, capturing its true ecological niche within the 'general items': 'sales of office supplies, daily necessities; network cabling engineering; even including the design and production of signboards, bronze plaques, trophies, and pennants.' The truth comes to light: this is fundamentally not an electronic manufacturing enterprise, but a standard Neighborhood IT & Office Supply Shop (community micro IT grocery shop and graphic advertising store). The boss relies on this entity to provide comprehensive grassroots services for the surrounding community and small companies, such as repairing computers, running network cables, installing surveillance, selling labor protection supplies, and making pennants. The so-called high-tech electronic manufacturing is entirely a disastrous mismatch of packaging and systemic classification.
